criteria.criterion: Compaction merges accumulated per-node edge-log entries into the CSR array
criteria.check: TestCompaction_MergesWithExistingGraph, TestCompaction_EntityCooccurWeightsSum: assert post-compaction CSRGraph.Neighbors reflects log-appended edges
TestCompaction_MergesWithExistingGraph: pre-existing graph.dat edges plus new log edges all present post-compaction
TestCompaction_NonCooccurDedupLastWrite: two log entries for the same (source,target,type) collapse to exactly one CSR entry

criteria.criterion: Weight increments on repeated ENTITY_COOCCUR edges
criteria.check: TestCompaction_EntityCooccurWeightsSum: N repeated appends with Weight:1 sum to Weight==N
explicit go test invocation with -timeout, run before commit as self-consistency (not verification)

criteria.criterion: Crash-safety: crash before graph.dat rename leaves old graph.dat + logs intact (safe retry)
Crash-safety: logs only truncated after graph.dat durably renamed
criteria.check: TestCompaction_TruncatesLogsAfterCompaction (positive path) + TestCompaction_TruncateFailureDoesNotLoseGraphUpdate (failure path proves graph update independent of truncate)
